injuries.notes: Previously questionable but officially active for the game.

off_field.notes: Hurts lost SB to Chiefs 38-35 two years prior. Intense personal motivation. 'I couldn't escape the emptiness.'
Historic 2000-yard rushing season. Team riding wave of Barkley's dominance.
Pursuing first three-peat in 59 years of Super Bowls. Historic pressure and public target.
Chiefs became public enemy #1. Swift booed at stadium. Massive media distraction all season. KC hadn't lost when she attended — streak ended in SB.
Travis Kelce undecided on 2025 return. $100M podcast deal. Potential last game distraction.
NFL record 17 straight one-score wins. Statistical regression candidate — unsustainable luck in close games.

eagles.notes: Won 16 of last 17 games. Playoff margins increasing: 12, 6, 32. Defense peaking — best 6 games by DVOA to end season.

chiefs.notes: Won 9 straight playoff games. But regular season margins were thin — SRS only 10th despite 15-2 record.

eagles.notes: Fangio's zero-blitz scheme was revolutionary. Mahomes was 8-0 vs Fangio before this. Fangio's hometown team, first season as Eagles DC.

chiefs.notes: Hall of Fame coach. Super Bowl experience unmatched. But scheme was vulnerable to Fangio's approach.

sb_rematch.notes: Eagles lost to Chiefs 38-35 in SB LVII two years prior. Strong revenge narrative.

three_peat_history.notes: No NFL team has ever three-peated in SB era. Historical precedent strongly against it.

chiefs_dynasty.notes: Chiefs in 5th SB in 6 years. Dynasty fatigue is real.
